sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n115444" key="yeudapo/stolos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ψευδ-απόστολος</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n115444.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">false ambassador</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">apostle,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0031.tlg008.perseus-grc1:11:13" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">2 Ep.Cor.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">11.13</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
